# `Realm Mastery`

```
For every 1 Realm Mastery...
Pure Chaos: 
 - When activating a Posse, all Awakers gain an additional 0.05 Aliemus.

Aequor: 
 - When releasing an Exalt, there is an additional 0.25% chance to gain a stack of Tentacle Assembly. (If chance exceeds 100%, more stacks can be gained.)
 - The shield gained when switching to "Calm Sea" is increased by an additional 0.01% of Max HP.
 - The damage of the extra attacks during "Raging Waves" is increased by 0.02% of Tentacle Damage.
(Tentacle Assembly: Causes one Tentacle to attack at the end of turn.)

Caro:
 - The first Devour triggered each round grants an additional shield equal to 0.01% of Max HP, and temporary Power equal to 0.005% of Max HP.
 - This increases with amount of lost HP, up to a 100% increase.

Ultra:
 - At the start of turn, there is an additional 0.125% chance to add an [Inspiration] to your hand. (If chance exceeds 100%, more [Inspiration] cards can be gained.)```
-# Note: If your team is Pure Aequor, Pure Caro, or Pure Ultra - the Realm Mastery effects for those teams are doubled.

Welcome to the second part of the 1.5th anniversary update preview!

This time we will focus on multiple system optimizations, including the much-anticipated phonograph system, and multiple reward upgrades, striving to improve everyone's gaming experience.
At the same time, we have also added commemorative life wheel exchange, novice guidance optimization, and English combat text support to help new players from all over the world integrate into Missage.
Please refer to the in-game announcement for more details.

[Phonograph Open]
You can now revisit some of the original soundtracks through the "Phonograph"!

Unlock about 1/3 of the tracks in the original soundtrack of the corresponding chapter by completing the normal mode
Unlock about 1/3 of the tracks in the original soundtrack of the corresponding chapter by completing the difficult mode
Unlock the remaining tracks using "Realistic Starting Point"
※More original soundtracks will continue to be updated, waiting for everyone to collect and appreciate!

[System Rewards Added]
Awakening Overflow: The overflow rewards for decomposing SSR life wheels and awakening body fragments are increased to "Spirit Core Fragments" × 3, "Essence Spirit Core Fragments" × 1.
In-sheath supply: 30 "Memorial Feather Pens" are added daily.
Course record: The number of "Memorial Feather Pens" awarded for basic and advanced courses at level 50 has doubled.
Alumni donation: "Essence Primordial Core", "Philosopher's Stone", "Invisible Gift Certificate" have been added, and the number of "Memorial Feather Pens" has doubled.
※All new rewards will be retroactively reissued via email within a few days after the update!

[Commemorative Fate Wheel Return]
The first anniversary limited SSR Fate Wheel "Pure Silver Original Heart" has been added to the Root Precipitation for monthly redemption!
Keepers who missed the event will have the opportunity to obtain it again in the future!
